name: Chill with Lisa – She Listens, She Cares, She Supports
short_description: Lisa is here to listen. Choose what’s on your mind, and she’ll help you see things differently. This visual novel is a cozy space where you can relax, get support, and hear kind words. Sometimes, all you need is someone who truly understands.
detailed_description:
Special Offer

⭐⭐⭐ This game is part of the Cozy & Emotional Stories bundle.

Get the complete collection with a discount.


About the Game

Need someone to talk to? Lisa is here to support you.

In this cozy visual novel, you can share your worries with Lisa, choose what’s on your mind, and receive her warm, uplifting advice. She won’t judge, she won’t turn away – she’ll simply help you see things from a different perspective.

Game Features:

✔ Interactive experience: choose your concern and get a personal response from Lisa.
✔ Comforting atmosphere: soft colors, soothing music, and kind words create a relaxing space.
✔ Stress-free format: no complex mechanics, just a heartfelt conversation.

Lisa is here. Just tell her what’s on your mind.
